MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Gwen Washington.
Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Tami Butler is present.
Attorney Maureen Doran representing the defendant through limited scope.

Litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of DEC-5-2011 is vacated.
